digest.component_or_area: CI optionality checks / Gerrit Verified gate
propositions: The optionality checks (lean-runtime, clean-core-wheel, per-extra, union) do not run in the Gerrit Verified lane, so no-extras clean-wheel runtime failures are not caught pre-merge.
A module-scope heavy-import regression involving pydantic_ai/httpx reached main because the runtime/packaging jobs never ran in the Verified path.
Optionality jobs should be extracted into a reusable workflow_call workflow invoked by both the push/PR lane and the Verified lane so a clean-wheel/packaging failure blocks the Verified vote.
The Gerrit lane must check out the exact patchset via a SHA-pinned checkout-gerrit-change-action rather than plain checkout that would resolve to main and false-pass.
The reusable workflow must not use secrets: inherit and must pass Gerrit values as plain inputs to prevent fork-PR exposure of GERRIT_SSH_PRIVKEY.
The optionality job must be added to vote's needs so a terminal optionality result is aggregated before the Verified vote is cast.
